title: krenakia humilis
intro: Krenakia humilis is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Sapindaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Krenakia humilis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Krenakia humilis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
